programmes.show_description: Alone: Hunted And Haunted. Surrounded by lions and hyenas, All-Star survivalist Lacey Jones is isolated, vulnerable and sleep-deprived as she takes on the African bush. S1, Ep3
Alone: Gary Of The Jungle. All-Star survivalist, Gary Golding, takes on the Belize jungle alone. He bonds with a turtle called Timmy, but an infection threatens his challenge. S1, Ep4
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Riverfront House. The guys take on a Victorian house in Wellsville, Ohio. Key items salvaged include harlequin windows, corbels and front porch columns. S5, Ep11
Little Chef Diner. The Dawgs stay in Roanoke to salvage an old diner sign. Back at the shop, the Whiteside family works together to build a clock from road signs. S5, Ep12
Murky Waters. Injured Shawn relies on his crew and the murky Bering Sea to salvage the empire. Toxic fumes threaten more than Zeke and Emily's season, and George has his final dive. S6, Ep9
No Place Like Nome. The Pomrenkes battle land and sea to vie for a new gold-rich mining ground. Meanwhile, Kris has one last chance to prove his captaincy and mining skills. S6, Ep10
The Victoria Diggers are back on the hunt for multi-million-dollar nuggets. Plus, rookie team the Dust Devils run into trouble with a new dry blower. S5, Ep1
The Tasmanian Tiger Down Under. After numerous eyewitness accounts of the Tasmanian tiger in Australia, Forrest heads to the Cape York Peninsula in search of this unique species. S1, Ep8
Mohawks & Madness, Goodness & Gladness. As the season with big pots and big paydays, the Seabrooke captain fights an illness and the Northwestern takes revenge on the Time Bandit. S7, Ep16
The Gamble. The captains are left reeling when their crab quota is slashed. Should they continue fishing the depleted red grounds or risk everything to find elusive blue crabs? S8, Ep1
Lone Gold. Gold miners Boyce and Ben separately head into the bush of British Columbia, seeking the next big pay streak. Completely alone, they race against winter to hit gold. S1, Ep1
The Ark Of The Covenant. Josh Gates heads to Israel and Ethiopia to search for the lost Ark of the Covenant, the sacred relic said to contain the Ten Commandments. S3, Ep12
England's Vanished Crown Jewels. Josh is on a quest to find the legendary lost treasure of King John. He explores the marshlands of England to find the despised king's crown jewels. S3, Ep13
Stuck In The Mud. Misty and Matt find themselves alone on a critical rescue of Alaskan homesteaders ill from dirty water and stuck in a crumbling cabin. S4, Ep2
Honestly Shared. The Misfits discover they're losing precious opal, so they attempt a dangerous night dig with an excavator and ultraviolet blacklights. S6, Ep14
Hard On The Edge. The Bushmen's home-made hoist and bucket fails. The Opal Whisperers, Sofia and Isaac, get trapped at the bottom of their open cut mine in sweltering temperatures. S6, Ep15
450 Mile Storm. Sig, Johnathan and Jake try to escape a second arctic hurricane, but Keith refuses to heed warnings. Stress-induced chest pains threaten the rest of Sig's season. S13, Ep14
Respect Earned. After suffering chest pains, Sig awaits news in the hospital. Wild Bill pilots the Summer Bay whilst handling conflict on deck, and Sean lays down the law with Zack. S13, Ep15
A child is taken critically ill at night, and a climber falls on the moors. Plus, it's a race against time to help a patient in cardiac arrest. S2, Ep9
The crew carry out an emergency roadside anaesthetic. Then, they save a man who's suffered a cardiac arrest and a biker who's crashed at night. S2, Ep10
Jacqui and Andrew feel the pressure as they battle hard rock ground that could ruin their latest deal. Plus, Shane and Russell search an ancient mine. S7, Ep15
Alone: Max Pushed To The Max. Constantly on the run to avoid territorial rhinos, elephants and lions, survivalist Max takes on the punishing African Savannah. S1, Ep5
Alone: Bugging Out. In the darkness of the Belize jungle, Kim Kelly is surrounded only by torrential downpours, infuriating ticks, and howler monkeys. S1, Ep6
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Roanoke Chamber Of Commerce. The Dawgs save pieces from the Roanoke Chamber of Commerce, including safe deposit boxes and a pneumatic messaging system. S5, Ep13
St. Michael's Catholic School. The team heads to St. Michael's Catholic School in Pittsburgh. They brave high-wire heights in order to save elements of the past. S6, Ep1
Breaking Point. Still reeling from deadly typhoon Hagibis, the fleet claws its way back into competition against the Russians - and the pressure to make up ground has mounted. S16, Ep3
Shotguns And Fist Fights. With the Russian menace looming, co-captains Johnathan and Jake blast a shotgun at their problems while a vicious fist fight breaks out on the Seabrooke. S16, Ep4
Double Agent. The Cornelia Marie taps American satellites to spy on the Russians while Scott Campbell Jr. pioneers a long-dormant fishery. And, Wild Bill faces big setbacks. S16, Ep5
The Bleeding Edge. Johnathan goes under the knife at sea and Junior bets it all while chasing the elusive Golden King crab. Plus, Wild Bill faces an unruly greenhorn. S16, Ep6
A Barrel Full Of Nuts. The Bushmen's drill rig loses a vital pin, forcing 74-year-old Les to undertake repairs four meters in the air. The Digi Diggers flooded mine wall collapses. S6, Ep17
High Goals. The Bushmen struggle to locate the source of water flooding their mine. The Misfits are forced to work Issy's mine Honey Hole as they wait for bulldozer repairs. S6, Ep18
From The Last Hole. The Bushmen bring in a master opal cutter, hoping to transform rough stones into a $100,000 haul. Sofia and Isaac are threatened by a mine roof collapse. S6, Ep19
Deep in the heart of the Australian Outback lie some of the largest gems on the planet. Passionate teams take big risks to hunt down these elusive treasures. S1, Ep2
The Richardsons hunt for fresh sapphire grounds. Will this big gamble pay off? Lost underground, the Mifsuds have a radical solution. Ray and Paul enter a danger zone. S1, Ep3
A tangle with a jack hammer could cost the Mifsuds a huge sapphire. The Rubyvale rocks bring the Old Timers unstuck, while Brianna faces her own set of disasters. S1, Ep4
A machinery problem adds more woes to the Dust Devils' nightmare start. Shane and Russell find gold, while the Poseidon Crew hunt for an intruder. S6, Ep2
Machinery breakdowns cause tensions to rise in the Poseidon Crew. The Ferals are moved onto a new lease, and the Gold Timers get stranded. S6, Ep3
An old treasure map leads the Poseidon Crew to a big nugget. Marcus and Linden call in some expert help, while Shane and Russell take a financial gamble. S6, Ep4
Family Secrets. Cindy struggles to deal with the painful secrets buried in her hoarding disorder and Pam must deal with her collecting to literally make room for her grandchildren. S1, Ep9
I Can't Breathe. Larina is on the verge of losing custody of her child due to her hoarding. But when confronted to let go of her clutter, her compulsion threatens to win the battle. S3, Ep9
Gold Rush Ghost House. A shadowy figure spies on a paranormal investigator, a man and his son stumble upon a talkative Bigfoot and a UFO is spotted on the Las Vegas strip. S7, Ep11
Nowhere To Run. Paranormal investigators Amy Bruni and Adam Berry help a mother left home alone with her kids after terrifying apparitions drove away her family. S4, Ep1
Silent Fear. Paranormal investigators Amy Bruni and Adam Berry and psychic medium Chip Coffey help a family who are being haunted by a demented creature. S4, Ep2
